name: Wearing cummerbunds
description: Your plate carrier has a pair of cummerbunds attached to it.

name: Wearing shoulder pads
description: Your plate carrier has a pair of shoulder pads attached to it.
//encumbrance_always: -2 for the pads themselves, and -1 to offset the volume-based encumbrance they add

name: Plate carrier proficiency effect
description: You've learned how to wear ballistic armor well, and now you enjoy the benefits of that knowledge.
